title: simple vanilla
description: A truly vanilla modpack that complements and enhances Minecraft without unnecessary mods that don’t fit in.
body:
**This is a vanilla-style Minecraft modpack that doesn’t turn into a random mod dump.**

**Just give it a try — you won’t regret it.**


**🌍 What to expect in this pack:**

1. A beautifully reimagined world, perfectly complemented by the Photon shaders.
2. A moderate number of new structures, all fully in the vanilla style.
3. Plenty of quality of life mods that make Minecraft feel smoother and more modern.
4. Most in-game sounds have been completely reworked, with many new ambient effects. Minecraft will sound fresh and immersive.
5. Fully functional multiplayer — you can play with friends using the built-in Essentials mod.
6. And of course, optimization: I’ve done my best to make the pack run as efficiently as possible. However, if you’re playing with shaders, keep in mind that this pack is still intended for powerful PCs.


**🛠 Recommended Settings:**

1. 8–10 GB of RAM is recommended for the best experience.
2. The pack was designed specifically for Photon shaders. I can’t guarantee stable performance with other shader packs. Photon perfectly preserves the pack’s atmosphere and tone, so I strongly recommend keeping them enabled.


**💬 Words from the author:**

> _“My friends and I got tired of playing vanilla Minecraft. We wanted something new, but without complicated mods — something that still kept the original Minecraft vibe. We searched online for vanilla-style modpacks, but after a while, we couldn’t find a single pack that truly felt like vanilla Minecraft, just improved — without unnecessary clutter.
> So I decided to make my own. We ended up playing it for several weeks, and surprisingly, everyone loved it so much that they convinced me to release it publicly.
> And here it is now. Enjoy the game!”_


**📌 Notes:**

+ You are allowed to modify the pack for personal use, but you may not publish it under your own name.
+ You’re welcome to make content (videos, streams, etc.) featuring this pack — just please include a link to the modpack page.
+ If you’d like to support the author, there’s a Ko-fi link on the modpack page. Any support is greatly appreciated and motivates me to create more awesome packs in the future.


**This modpack includes the following resource packs, used with attribution:**

Stay True - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true

FA+Objects - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/fa-objects
